overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character exploring a dark, industrial sci-fi facility with atmospheric green lighting and volumetric fog. The character walks through metal corridors toward a massive glowing red cylindrical reactor structure, passing other figures in the environment before approaching an archway exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial maintenance corridor with green lighting

events.description: passing by two stationary figures standing in the corridor ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the industrial corridor, approaching distant figures

notable_agents.action: standing still in the corridor ahead, facing the approaching character

entered.detail: rusted metal walls with exposed pipes and industrial cabling
vertical light panels emitting green fluorescent light
dense network of industrial pipes and conduits on the ceiling
large metal containers and crates stacked along the wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow industrial corridor bathed in green artificial light. Metal walls line the left side while storage crates occupy the right. Two figures stand stationary in the distance as the character approaches them.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial plaza approaching large cylindrical reactor

events.description: red glow from large cylindrical reactor becomes visible ahead, mixing with green ambient light
passing by an NPC standing near the wall on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the environment opens up, approaching the large red glowing structure

notable_agents.action: standing near the wall, facing away from the camera

entered.detail: massive cylindrical structure with glowing red-orange core and white symbol on top
elevated walkways with metal railings on the left side
large cylindrical tanks and industrial equipment

segments.scene_description: The corridor opens into a wider industrial plaza where a massive red-glowing cylindrical reactor dominates the center background. The character walks toward this structure while passing metal catwalks on the left and industrial machinery on the right. The lighting shifts from pure green to a mix of green and red.

scene_state.functional_zone: central reactor chamber with glowing cylindrical core

events.description: character begins circling around the large red cylinder, changing direction slightly
passing close to the glowing red cylinder, heat distortion visible at the base

agents.ego_description: walking around the perimeter of the large cylindrical reactor, observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: walking past the reactor in the opposite direction

entered.detail: circular white light ring at the base of the red cylinder
large metal archway with horizontal slats leading to another area

segments.scene_description: The character circles around the massive red reactor, passing close to its glowing base. The environment is a wide chamber with the reactor as the central feature. An arched exit doorway becomes visible in the distance as the character moves around the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor leading to blue-lit archway exit

events.description: blue light from the archway becomes more prominent as the red glow diminishes behind
approaching the arched exit with view of distant lights visible through the grating

agents.ego_description: walking toward the archway exit, leaving the reactor chamber behind

entered.detail: bright blue light emanating from beyond the archway
faint lights of a distant city visible through the archway grating

segments.scene_description: The character moves away from the reactor toward a large metal archway. The lighting shifts from red-orange to cool blue as the exit approaches. Through the archway's horizontal slats, distant city lights are visible, suggesting a transition to a new area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark industrial facility that transforms from a narrow green-lit corridor into a vast chamber dominated by a glowing red reactor. It begins with the character walking past metal walls and storage crates toward two stationary figures under a heavy green artificial glow. As the corridor opens into a wider plaza, the lighting shifts to a mix of green and red while the camera passes metal catwalks and machinery toward a massive, glowing cylindrical reactor. The scene then expands as the character circles the base of the reactor, revealing a wide chamber and a distant arched exit. Finally, the camera moves away from the red-orange glow toward the archway, where the light shifts to a cool blue and distant city lights become visible through horizontal slats.
